title: Rich Italian Paneer Paella
description: A pungent and chewy Italian dish featuring paneer, slow-cooked to perfection in a paella pan, with an ayurvedic-sattvic friendly twist.

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, carrots, and zucchini

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until they are tender.
Add the Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato puree, vegetable broth, dried oregano, and salt, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Add the paneer to the paella pan and stir to combine.
Continue to simmer, covered, for another 10 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the paella pan from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
